{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56216","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56216/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56216/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56216/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56216","id":2595273749,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6asLwV","number":56216,"title":"REPLExt: no method matching repl_init(::REPL.LineEditREPL) when loading packages in REPL mode.","user":{"login":"ndgnuh","id":33273948,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMzMjczOTQ4","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33273948?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh","html_url":"https://github.com/ndgnuh","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ndgnuh/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-17T16:59:42Z","updated_at":"2024-10-17T16:59:42Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Behaviour

When loading some packages in REPL, `REPLExt` throws an exception. 

### Expected behaviour

No exception thrown?

### Reproduce

To reproduce:
1. `julia-release --startup-file=no -t 1`
2. `using IJulia` (or other packages)

Packages that reproduce the bug:
- `IJulia`
- `Pluto`
- `CairoMakie`

Packages that don't reproduce the bug:
- `StaticArrays`
- `PackageCompiler`

### Version info:

```
Julia Version 1.11.1
Commit 8f5b7ca12ad (2024-10-16 10:53 UTC)
Build Info:
  Official https://julialang.org/ release
Platform Info:
  OS: Linux (x86_64-linux-gnu)
  CPU: 16 × AMD Ryzen 7 4800H with Radeon Graphics
  WORD_SIZE: 64
  LLVM: libLLVM-16.0.6 (ORCJIT, znver2)
Threads: 16 default, 0 interactive, 8 GC (on 16 virtual cores)
Environment:
  JULIA_NUM_THREADS = 16
  LD_LIBRARY_LOADPATH = /opt/wine-staging/lib64:/opt/wine-staging/lib:/opt/nvim-linux64/lib:/opt/containerd/lib:
  JULIA_CUDA_USE_BINARYBUILDER = true
  JULIA_DEPOT_PATH = /home/<my-user>/.cache/julia
```

- In REPL, when the exception is thrown, load the package again to make it works (v1.11.1).
